mano_cua.result_summary: 预加载的代码块在页面加载时无语法高亮，所有文本显示为统一深色（step 4观察HTML代码全部同色）。点击/聚焦编辑器后代码块出现颜色区分（class属性和字符串显示不同颜色）。不符合预期：代码块应在页面加载后立即显示语法高亮而不需要用户先点击。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Stuck trying to use DevTools console for programmatic color verification. Key visual observation: pre-loaded code block showed no syntax highlighting before clicking (all uniform color), but showed some color differentiation after editor received focus.
